name: ken-ai
description: DEPRECATED - use the Ken MCP server directly. End-to-end Ken AI campaign creation: ICP planning, KenSearch targeting, qualification and segmentation prompts, email copy with review loop, AI personalization prompts, and pure-MCP campaign configuration on the Ken AI platform.

interface.shortDescription: DEPRECATED - Ken AI workflows now live in the Ken MCP server
interface.longDescription: DEPRECATED - this plugin is retired. The full cold-email campaign-creation workflow now runs natively on the Ken MCP server (https://mcp.getken.ai/ken-ai/mcp): plan a broad ICP with segments, build KenSearch prospect targeting, write qualification and segmentation prompts, draft and review email copy, generate AI personalization prompts, and push everything to the platform. Connect the ken-ai MCP server in your client and call list_skills to see everything available. This plugin version ships only deprecation shims plus the bundled MCP server config.
defaultPrompt: Plan and configure a new Ken AI cold-email campaign for a client
Show the enrichment status of my Ken AI campaign
